title: Implement comprehensive test suite for debug features
description: Create python/tests/sim/test_debug_features.py with tests for: debug control functions (enable/disable/is_debug_enabled), debug logging activation, node state tracking with debug, timing assertions with debug, fail-fast scenario testing, and system state observation during complex operations.
close_reason: Comprehensive test suite implemented in python/tests/sim/test_debug_features.py with 11 tests covering debug control functions, enhanced logging with structlog context (node_state, pending_txs, event_queue_len etc.), node state tracking, timing assertions, fail-fast error scenarios, system state observation in multi-node ops, and full integration test. Verified: pytest passes (11/11), ruff check clean. Gates verified.
